error.signature: [WARN] No DDS participants discovered on domain 0

verdict.summary: ROS 2 nodes cannot discover each other. Usually a DDS multicast or ROS_DOMAIN_ID mismatch.

dead_ends.why_fails: Discovery issues are network/DDS configuration problems, not installation problems
Discovery failure usually stems from network config (firewall, multicast), not the DDS vendor
This disables network discovery entirely; nodes on other machines become invisible

workarounds.action: Verify ROS_DOMAIN_ID matches on all machines
workarounds.how: echo $ROS_DOMAIN_ID  # must be the same on all machines (default: 0)

workarounds.action: Check firewall allows UDP multicast on ports 7400-7500
Test with ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY=1 on single machine first to isolate network issues

frequently_confused_with.distinction: QoS incompatibility drops messages but nodes see each other; DDS discovery failure means nodes cannot see each other at all
